notes: Watchlist was EMPTY at the 10:00 run (premarket 8:30 trigger never committed), so per the EOD/premarket guidance I manually re-ran scripts/premarket_scan.py at ~10:08 ET. Computed live indicators for all 25 and evaluated the full entry gate. NO symbol passed all criteria. Dominant blocker is rel_vol < 1.5: rel_vol = cumulative IEX 5-min volume / 20d avg daily volume, which reads low this early in the session and on the free IEX feed. Only MCY (2.55) and MBUU (4.0) cleared rel_vol but both failed trend/momentum (EMA9<EMA21, RSI low-30s/40s, MACD falling) — pullbacks, not breakouts, so correctly skipped. Account healthy (equity ~$100k, no PDT, no flags). Conservative correct outcome: zero forced entries. Account still bootstrap with 0 completed trades.

summary: Fixed two issues in the entry-signal engine. (1) Bar fetch (scripts/compute_indicators.py fetch_5min_bars + fetch_daily_bars) was passing Alpaca's `limit`, which returns the OLDEST bars in the window — so RSI/EMA/MACD/EMA-200 and watchlist `close` were computed off days-stale bars (NVDA was on last Friday's data). Now end-anchored: fetches the full window / tails the dailies, so indicators use current bars. (2) rel_vol redefined as time-of-day RVOL (lib/indicators.time_of_day_rvol): today's cumulative volume vs the average cumulative volume up to the same time of day over the prior RVOL_LOOKBACK_DAYS (14) sessions — feed-agnostic, fixing the structurally-low IEX readings that were the binding constraint rejecting ~23/25 names. Verified live: NVDA 1.08, AAPL 1.52, MBUU 1.72, MCY 0.12 (vs old broken 0.196 / 2.37). VWAP now resets per session. Added config INDICATOR_INTRADAY_LOOKBACK_DAYS=20, RVOL_LOOKBACK_DAYS=14. Legacy compute_relative_volume / apply_all_intraday signatures kept for back-compat; all 36 tests pass. No trade decisions made this run.

Started flat (0 positions carried in) so Parts 3-4 had nothing to manage. Pre-flight clean: equity ~$99,999, daytrade_count 0, not PDT, not blocked, no kill_switch/no_trade flags, VIX 16.55, SPY trending up (regime cap 10), daily P&L flat ~$0. Recomputed fresh indicators on all 25 watchlist names and re-ran the 7-criteria gate. EXACTLY ONE passed: MPC (Marathon Petroleum) - close 269.42 > VWAP 267.37 (clear intraday uptrend), EMA9 268.88 > EMA21 268.59, RSI 68.2 (in range), MACD hist rising, rel_vol 2.04, sentiment positive, >EMA200d 210.87, ATR-pct 0.08 (calm). Met the higher midday bar (elevated RVOL + clean trend, large-cap not parabolic). Entered 18 sh @ $269.65, stop $269.09, notional $4,850 (4.85% equity, just under 5% cap). EXECUTION ISSUE: place_order.py grabbed a partial-fill snapshot and recorded only 2 sh while the market order actually filled all 18 (verified on Alpaca), and its stop-loss was rejected by Alpaca wash-trade protection right after the fill. Manually placed a GTC stop for the full 18 sh @ $269.09 (now active, status NEW) and corrected positions.json + trade_log.jsonl to 18 sh; posted a warning attention alert documenting the fix. Position is protected. The morning-flagged closest misses AVGO and FIX did NOT recover by midday (AVGO EMA9<EMA21 + RSI 44.5; FIX MACD falling + rel_vol 1.32). NOTE: a pre-existing untracked 1-sh SPY position sits in the account (not in positions.json, not bot-managed) - left untouched. MPC currently ~break-even (UPL -$1.62, -0.03%). First live entry; still near bootstrap.

observations: First day of deployed capital and first completed trade: MPC entered midday on a clean RVOL-2.04 large-cap breakout but never extended — it drifted to ~break-even/slightly red and was closed at EOD (sold 18 @ 268.00, -29.70 / -0.61%) for failing two safe-hold gates (not profitable, trailing stop never activated). The miss was structural: MPC is a very low-ATR name (atr_pct ~0.05-0.08), so the partial-profit and trail triggers sat only pennies above entry and the stop only ~0.12% below, leaving no room for the trade to work intraday. Account net -9.79 (-0.01%) vs SPY +0.46% (alpha -0.47% on the day, but Bull is still fractionally ahead cumulatively). Takeaway for tomorrow: favor entries with more ATR headroom so partial/trail mechanics are reachable; book is flat overnight, regime calm (VIX ~16.5, SPY up).
